ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock price record */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to reference the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock, accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, ADBE) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company (e.g., Apple Inc., Adobe Inc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector (e.g., Technology, Energy) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., Analyst, Investor, Administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Investor, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to reference the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON string or serialized data of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
